title: Mekanism Bigger Teleporters
body:
# Mekanism Bigger Teleporters
## About

A Mekanism addon that increases teleporter size up to 23x23.



## Features
- The teleporter can now be as big as 23x23 or as small as the default Mekanism teleporter.
- Must have the teleporter block in the center.
  
# Credits

[Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism) by bradyaidanc;
